summary: Tested God Mode session join bug fix. Backend effective_role parameter is working correctly - admin users can join sessions when masked as Surfer roles, and are correctly blocked when masked as non-surfer roles (Photographer, Business). Also fixed a bug in JumpInSessionModal.js where undefined variables (basePrice, discount) were used instead of (sessionBuyinPrice, subDiscount).

backend_effective_role_parameter.description: JoinSessionRequest now accepts optional effective_role parameter

god_mode_surfer_role_validation.description: Admin with effective_role='Surfer' passes role validation
god_mode_surfer_role_validation.test_result: Got 'Insufficient credits' error (not 'Only surfers'), meaning role check passed

god_mode_invalid_role_blocking.test_result: Got 'Only surfers can join sessions. Current persona: Photographer'

normal_user_without_effective_role.description: Users without effective_role use their actual DB role for validation

frontend_jumpinflow_uses_persona.description: UnifiedSpotDrawer.js JumpInFlow imports usePersona and passes effective_role

frontend_jumpinsessionmodal_uses_persona.description: JumpInSessionModal.js imports usePersona and passes effective_role

JumpInSessionModal.js_undefined_variable.issue: Lines 286-291 used undefined variables 'basePrice' and 'discount' instead of 'sessionBuyinPrice' and 'subDiscount'
JumpInSessionModal.js_undefined_variable.fix_applied: Replaced basePrice with sessionBuyinPrice and discount with subDiscount

critical_code_review_comments: Backend sessions.py correctly implements God Mode validation with surfer_role_names list
Frontend correctly conditionally passes effective_role only when isGodMode && activePersona is truthy
PersonaContext provides getEffectiveRole() function for consistent role resolution
context_for_next_testing_agent: God Mode session join fix verified. The effective_role parameter is passed from frontend to backend when admin is in God Mode with a persona active. Backend validates against surfer_role_names list ('Grom', 'Surfer', 'Comp Surfer', 'Pro', 'Competition Surfer') when is_admin=true AND effective_role is set. The JumpInSessionModal.js had a bug with undefined variables that was fixed.

test_admin_god_mode_surfer.expected: Pass role check (fail at credit check if no credits)

test_admin_god_mode_photographer.expected: Fail role check with persona-specific error
test_admin_god_mode_photographer.actual: Got 'Only surfers can join sessions. Current persona: Photographer' - PASS

test_admin_no_effective_role.expected: Use actual role (Pro) which is valid surfer role
